paper_facing_description: Routine cross-border approval path with domestic review, coordination forwarding, foreign review, and issuance
Additional-information path in which the applicant responds and the case resumes to the saved review context before issuance
Negative review path in which the case is rejected during review due to missing or unsatisfactory supporting evidence
Post-issuance substantive amendment with renewed review and document supersession trace
Post-issuance non-substantive amendment finalized without renewed foreign review
Post-issuance revocation path ending in terminal revocation state
Applicant attempts a regulator-only review transition
Submission attempted without the minimum mandatory submission bundle
Legitimate actor attempts a transition from the wrong state
